mapper.select: SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblRestockWaitId, SM.SO_NO, SP.PROD_CD, SP.PROD_NM, SP.QTY AS returnQty, AG.AGNT_NM, ISNULL(SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') AS inboundYn FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AG ON SM.AGNT_CD = AG.AGNT_CD WHERE SM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ISNULL(SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N' AND SM.DC_CD = #{dcCd} AND SM.DLVY_CNFM_DT BETWEEN #{fromDt} AND #{toDt} AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SM.SAVE_TIME DESC
SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID WHERE SM.SO_NO = #{barcode} AND ISNULL(SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblRestockWaitId, SP.PROD_CD, SP.PROD_NM, SP.QTY AS returnQty, AG.AGNT_NM, SM.SO_NO FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AG ON SM.AGNT_CD = AG.AGNT_CD WHERE SM.SO_NO = #{soNo} AND ISNULL(SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N' AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET RESTOCK_INBOUNDED = 'Y', RESTOCK_INBOUND_DT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), RESTOCK_INBOUND_USER = #{saveUser}, RESTOCK_INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{saveUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblRestockWaitId} AND ISNULL(RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblRestockWaitId, MM.BARCODE AS barcode, SP.PROD_CD AS prodCd, MM.MTRL_NM AS prodNm, SP.QTY AS returnQty, AG.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, /* [수정] 상품의 실제 재고가 있는 피킹 가능 로케이션 조회 */ ISNULL(( SELECT TOP 1 L.LOC_CD FROM TBL_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID WHERE S.MTRL_CD = SP.PROD_CD AND S.CMPY_CD = SM.CMPY_CD AND L.PICKING_YN = 'Y' AND L.USE_YN = 'Y' AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 /* 실제 재고가 있는 곳 우선 */ ORDER BY S.STOCK_QTY DESC /* 재고가 가장 많은 곳을 추천 */ ), '미지정') AS fixedLocNm FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AG ON SM.AGNT_CD = AG.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M MM ON SP.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD AND SM.CMPY_CD = MM.CMPY_CD WHERE SM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND SM.DC_CD = #{dcCd} AND SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED = 'Y' AND ISNULL(SP.PUTAWAY_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET PUTAWAY_YN = 'Y', PUTAWAY_DT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), PUTAWAY_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{saveUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblRestockWaitId}

MERGE INTO TBL_STOCK AS TARGET USING ( /* TOP 1을 사용하여 중복 조인 방지 */ SELECT TOP 1 SM.CMPY_CD, SM.AGNT_CD, SP.PROD_CD AS MTRL_CD, LM.ZONE_ID, LM.LOC_ID, ISNULL(SM.DC_CD, '1000') AS WH_CD FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M MM ON SP.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD AND SM.CMPY_CD = MM.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M LM ON LM.CMPY_CD = SM.CMPY_CD AND LM.LOC_CD = ISNULL(#{locBarcode}, MM.FIXED_LOC_CD) WHERE SP.TBL_SO_P_ID = #{waitId} AND LM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND LM.DELETED_YN = 'N' ) AS SOURCE ON ( TARGET.CMPY_CD = SOURCE.CMPY_CD AND TARGET.MTRL_CD = SOURCE.MTRL_CD AND TARGET.LOC_ID = SOURCE.LOC_ID AND TARGET.WH_CD = SOURCE.WH_CD /* 센터 코드 매칭 추가로 정확도 향상 */ ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TARGET.STOCK_QTY = TARGET.STOCK_QTY + 1, TARGET.UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), TARGET.UPDT_USER = 'SYSTEM_PUT' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, WH_CD) VALUES (SOURCE.CMPY_CD, SOURCE.AGNT_CD, SOURCE.MTRL_CD, SOURCE.ZONE_ID, SOURCE.LOC_ID, 1, 0, GETDATE(), 'SYSTEM_PUT', SOURCE.WH_CD);
mapper.select: SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblRestockWaitId, SM.SO_NO, SM.REF_SO_NO, SP.PROD_CD, SP.PROD_NM, SP.QTY AS returnQty, AG.AGNT_NM, ISNULL(SP.YONGIN_INBOUNDED, 'N') AS inboundYn, SM.DLVY_CNFM_DT, SM.DC_CD, SM.AGNT_CD FROM TBL_SO_P SP INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M PM ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AG ON SM.AGNT_CD = AG.AGNT_CD WHERE SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND SM.DC_CD = #{dcCd} /* 불량/반품 관련 SO 유형 필터링 */ AND SM.SO_TYPE IN ('2000', '3200', '4200', '9903', '9906', '6000') /* 입고되지 않은 건만 조회 */ AND ISNULL(SP.YONGIN_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N' AND SM.DLVY_CNFM_DT BETWEEN #{fromDt} AND #{toDt} ORDER BY SM.SAVE_TIME DESC
